---
title: "Part I --- Theories and applications of teaching programming"
bibliography: references.bib
author:
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
---
::: {.content-visible when-format="docx" note="this should be identical as authors above, for docx"}
author:
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
:::

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS PART

## Theme --- Pair Programming: What? How? Why? 

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C12]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C12] Where Do I Even Start With Pair Programming in My Classroom? A Conversation With Seasoned Practitioners.

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C36]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C36] Structured Group Work With Assigned Asymmetrical Roles and Switching: Lessons From Pair Programming Across Disciplines

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C41]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C41] Pair Programming in Practice: A PhD Tutor's Reflections 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU



## Theme --- Building healthy programming habits

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C09]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C09] Brain Book Buddy Boss Break: A Practical Debugging Framework for Learners

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C40]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C40] Modes of coding practice

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C05]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C05] A Guide on Empowering Students to Develop a Coding Mindset

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


## Theme --- Programming in a world of Gen AI 

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C08]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C08] Hype and The Need for Responsible Compute (previously called Boom or Bust)

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C10]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C10] Teaching, Learning and Assessment for coding with the emergence of generative AI

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C21]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C21] How Teaching Programming Across Disciplines Can Prove Useful  - love letter to critical thinking (computational and systems)

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C44]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C44] GenAI vs Developing Academic Skills

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


## Theme --- Best teaching practices for programming courses 


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C11]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C11] Sequential vs. Simultaneous: Approaches to Learning Programming and Statistics 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C14]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C14] Practices to Foster Inclusion and Accessibility in Programming Teaching

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C04]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C04] Computer says no: Removing technological barriers in programming courses 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C33]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C33] Overcoming coding anxiety: learnings and strategies 
SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C34]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C34] 3 Stars and 1 Wish: Small and Frequent Student Reflections to promote a Sense of Wonder and a Community of Vulnerability

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="epub"}

## References {.unnumbered}

:::
